text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the academy, I invite
Kawakami Princess to see a stage performance at
a theme park.

text_block_list.name: Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then let us dance, my dear prince—until the
morning star rises!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wooow... What a lovely show that was!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I did indeed! I had always wanted to see that
show. Thank you for bringing me along.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That elaborate dress the princess wore as she
danced with the prince...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Was nothing compared to how agile her steps
were! Those bold maneuvers and powerful
twists—it was spectacular!
choice_data_list:
You found the dancing more impressive than
the dress, huh?

You found the dancing more impressive than
the dress, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The dress was wonderful too, of course! One of
the reasons I started admiring princesses was
seeing Princess Fighter's dress.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Its spellbinding sparkle gripped my innocent little
heart. But...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The brilliance of a princess is not just about
appearances!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What truly makes a princess dazzle is her
unyielding effort.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've come to understand that feeling more and
more ever since I entered Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine the amount of sheer grit and
determination the princess today put into her
dance...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's that very effort which makes her so
breathtaking! In my eyes, she is a true princess!
choice_data_list:
Well, that would make you a true princess as
well.

Well, that would make you a true princess as
well.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Where did that come from? You're going
to make me blush!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Besides... The reason I can work so hard is
because you're—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the previously dark stage is lit once
again, and the princess elegantly makes her
appearance.

text_block_list.name: Princess
text_block_list.text:
The party is not over yet! Now then, everyone,
let's dance together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my, oh my! What a lovely encore!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I must hurry and—

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Mama, I don't know how to dance.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know if I'm comfortable dancing
either...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Why isn't anyone else dancing? And after we
received such a delightful invitation...
choice_data_list: Let's show them how it's done together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Really? But dancing is about expressing your
feelings. There's nothing wrong with being bold
and dancing freely!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That girl is so pretty when she spins around.
She's like the princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, would you like to dance together, my little
princess?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: But... I don't know how...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry—I'll teach you. ♪ Come, you
princesses over there can join in too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now then! Watch me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll take the radiance you've helped me acquire
and share it with everybody, as a princess should!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Wooow! This is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess lifts the children up into her
arms, and they begin a pleasant dance together.
Her gallant figure invites cheers from the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's a fantastic idea! Just like you revealed the
princess road to me, tonight we'll do the same for
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay, Trainer, give me your hand.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll show that taking the lead in a dance is no
problem for one fit to be a princess! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! We'll take it nice and slow! I won't go
throwing you into the air or anything.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay. One, two, three... One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is just like we're dancing at a real
ball. ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! U-um... Would you dance with me too,
princess?

text_block_list.name: Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course. Let's dance together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how much fun Kawakami Princess is having
encourages the audience to follow her lead. This
night will make for a great memory.
